query:
SELECT
  damage_description,
  physics_analysis,
  forensic_analysis,
  total_loss_reasoning,
  fraud_indicators,
  fraud_score_breakdown_json,
  repair_intelligence_json,
  cost_intelligence_json,
  damaged_components_json
FROM ai_assessments
WHERE claim_id = 2730001
LIMIT 1;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zQEb4HwERZa3vD.6f0bc5e32ffe --database YbS42LwGroxbVepAMjk4bS --execute 
SELECT
  damage_description,
  physics_analysis,
  forensic_analysis,
  total_loss_reasoning,
  fraud_indicators,
  fraud_score_breakdown_json,
  repair_intelligence_json,
  cost_intelligence_json,
  damaged_components_json
FROM ai_assessments
WHERE claim_id = 2730001
LIMIT 1;
messages: Isuzu D Teq (2013). Vehicle sustained damages on the RHS Tail Lamp, Rear Bumper, Rear Bumper Sensors, Front Bumper Slides, Grille, Diff Connectors, Front Bumper, Tow Hinge, Tail Gate, RHS Loading Panel, Radiator Support Panel and Rear End Piece. Excluded Tail Gate Locks and Inner Front Bumper Frame as not accident related.. 12 damaged components identified.	{"impactForceKn":187.73,"impactVector":{"direction":"rear","magnitude":187730,"angle":0},"energyDistribution":{"kineticEnergyJ":28166.666666666668,"energyDissipatedJ":15000,"energyDissipatedKj":15},"estimatedSpeedKmh":19.6,"deltaVKmh":14,"decelerationG":0,"accidentSeverity":"minor","reconstructionSummary":"A rear collision involving a 2013 Isuzu D Teq (1900kg). Energy dissipated: 15.0 kJ. Delta-V: 14.0 km/h. 12 damaged component(s) identified.","damageConsistencyScore":50,"latentDamageProbability":{"engine":0,"transmission":0,"suspension":0,"frame":0,"electrical":0},"physicsExecuted":true}	NULL	NULL	[
"Damage photographs detected in source document but not yet processed through the photo analysis pipeline. Manual review recommended."

"correctionReason": "Original indicator no_damage_photos (score 15) was incorrect. Input recovery confirmed images are present on pages 3-4 of the source PDF but were not ingested into the photo analysis pipeline. Correct indicator is photos_not_ingested (score 5).",
"description": "Damage photographs detected in source document but not yet processed through the photo analysis pipeline. Manual review recommended."

"notes": "Assessor declared claim authentic. Chain collision mechanism (insured strikes third party rear, third party strikes vehicle ahead) is mechanically consistent with reported damage zones. Score raised from 50 to 72 on assessor declaration and collision mechanism plausibility."
"quoteDeviationNote": "Deviation calculated against AI expected cost (USD 3,420). Agreed cost (USD 2,576) is the assessor-negotiated figure from 3 submitted quotes.",
"correctionReason": "Quote was embedded in assessor PDF but not ingested by pipeline. Agreed cost USD 2,576 and market value USD 17,000 recovered from source document."
